entry.title: Would OP_SUCCESS (OP_CAT) be spent?
entry.summary: The discussion revolves around the potential for implementing a soft fork in the technology, emphasizing that a sufficiently attractive proposition is feasible. The current lack of a proposal does not necessarily indicate that it is impossible or won't happen in the future. This perspective suggests optimism about the capability to introduce changes through a soft fork, contingent upon developing an appealing and strategic approach. The statement underscores the importance of not jumping to conclusions based on the absence of existing proposals, implying that efforts and ideas could be underway or developed to make such a deployment possible.
